name: async_tick_count_read
notes: Async event source READ-side: how a user FSM reads the injected world.tick_count field (the FrameTimer plugin-as-writer field, rate via EVIDENT_TICK_MS). tick_count=5 (<10) → heartbeat IntToStr(5), stays TWatch. The deterministic transition is captured here; the async INJECTION (the wall-clock timer thread / awaiter that increments tick_count) is non-deterministic real time and outside a deterministic fixture — the bigger awaiter sub-project. Doubly-witnessed: CurrentRuntime probe sat_emits_tick_count + SmtLib Method A/B.
